test.note: No test script configured - project uses browser-based testing via agent-browser

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document TanStack Router hash-based routing quirks: useLocation().search doesn't correctly parse query parameters when hash-based routing is used. Use window.location.hash or URL object with hash-based parsing instead.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature add-simulator-links worker discovered this issue when implementing 'Try in Simulator' links

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on using window.location for hash-based navigation patterns, as TanStack Router's navigate() may not handle query parameters correctly with hash routing
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature add-simulator-links worker used window.location.hash workaround
